ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: create a token here https://github.com/settings/tokens/new (only gist permission required)
ast.target: 在此处创建令牌 https://github.com/settings/tokens/new（仅需 gist 权限）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 Github API 令牌

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [before-after-hook]: \"Hook()\" 重新用途警告，请使用 \"Hook.Collection()\"。了解更多：https://git.io/upgrade-before-after-hook-to-1.4

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GitHub token not found, check your settings
ast.target: 未找到 GitHub 令牌，请检查您的设置

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an error creating your gist, check your token and connection
ast.target: 创建您的 gist 时出错，请检查您的令牌和网络连接

ast.name: name
ast.source: Save current file as a new private Gist
ast.target: 将当前文件保存为新的私有 Gist

ast.name: name
ast.source: Save current selection as a new private Gist
ast.target: 将当前选区保存为新的私有 Gist
